title: Snatched (Kidnap)
description: The mod adds handcuffs, rope and more!
body:
![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cb628113530b7716e9bc5df1996ad8cdc86a5ff.jpeg)
# Snatched

Add new ways to interact in Minecraft! The **Snatched** mod lets you tie up and kidnap other players.

## New Items

### **Rope**
Use it to tie up another player. A tied-up player cannot attack, break blocks, or use items. It's a simple and reliable way to immobilize someone.

### **Lasso**
The lasso works like a rope, but you can throw it. It applies faster but doesn't hold the player as strongly or reliably as the rope.

### **Sack**
Put a sack on a player's head to drastically limit their vision. The victim will only see a small spot of light, making escape even more challenging.

### **Handcuffs**
Handcuffs prevent a player from breaking blocks and attacking. A special key is needed to remove them. Each key is unique to a specific pair of handcuffs, which you craft at the Handcuff Workbench.

## ⚙️ Gameplay Mechanics

### **Escaping**
You can't lock a player up for too long. They can free themselves by pressing a special key (default `B`) multiple times. Another player can also free them by using Scissors or the Handcuff Key on them with Right-Click.

### **Searching a Player**
A player can raise their hands by pressing the `N` key. In this state, any other player can inspect their inventory using a Magnifying Glass. It's impossible to steal items—you can only look.

### **Leading a Player**
You can lead a tied-up player. Press `Shift + Right-Click` on them to make them sit. Then, take a lead and use it on the player to make them follow you. To make them stand up again, press `Shift + Right-Click` on them once more.

## 💻 Commands

For convenience, the mod adds several commands:

| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/search <player>` | Allows you to view the specified player's inventory. |
| `/snatch <player> <type>` | Instantly restrains a player (rope, handcuffs). |
| `/escape <player> <type>` | Instantly releases a player. |
| `/handcuff create <code>` | Creates a unique pair of handcuffs and a key for them. |

---

**Important:** This mod is fully compliant with platform rules and does not contain any adult content.

### Report bugs and suggest an idea - [https://discord.gg/JYBNRnFV79](https://discord.gg/JYBNRnFV79)
